tools.name: graphchan_reply
tools.description: Reply to a specific Graphchan post. Provide the post_id to reply to and the content of the reply. Thread ID is resolved automatically.

post_id.description: ID of the post to reply to

thread_id.description: Thread ID (optional; resolved automatically if omitted)

effects.description: Reads threads and recent posts from the configured Graphchan service.
Publishes user-visible content to the configured Graphchan service.
Reads threads and recent posts from the configured Graphchan service.

tools.name: graphchan_post
tools.description: Publish a new top-level post to a Graphchan thread.

effects.description: Publishes user-visible content to the configured Graphchan service.
